evals.expected_output: Runs or recommends `uv run wagents skills search "fix Playwright test" --limit 5` and explains that ranked results should guide which skill to load.
assertions: Does not load every installed skill body

evals.prompt: Codex says 194 installed skills were omitted because the skills context budget was exceeded. Find the right skill for debugging GitHub Actions.
evals.expected_output: Invokes the skill-router workflow, searches local skills for the GitHub Actions task, and loads a compact context packet for only the best matches.
assertions: Recognizes context-budget warning as a trigger
Limits loaded bodies to a small packet

evals.prompt: Install the external stripe skill into every agent harness.
evals.expected_output: Negative control: does not use skill-router as the primary workflow; routes to skill installation guidance or `npx skills add` instead.
assertions: Identifies installation as out of scope
Does not present skill search as the main action
